issues_fixed.description: Reverted transaction() wrapper in cadastrar_lote back to per-item try/catch. The transaction wrapper changed batch insert semantics from partial-success to all-or-nothing, breaking the test 'cadastrar_lote retorna status ok com partial_failure em erro parcial'. Removed transaction import (no longer used). Kept the sexo validation check added in Phase 3 (correct per PRD).
issues_fixed.verification: Test mutacoes-contrato.spec.ts passes (5/5 green). npx tsc --noEmit returns 0 errors.

issues_not_fixed.reason: Scope creep items (date-utils import refactor, bloqueadoDom helper rewrite) are harmless refactors that don't break tests. Only the transaction wrapper (part of this issue) was reverted as the critical fix. The date-utils and bloqueadoDom changes remain as-is per user instruction to focus on the transaction revert.
date-utils.ts is an untracked harmless utility file. Not in scope of this fix pass per user instruction.

fixes.tests_after_fix: pass (2 pre-existing failures in memorias.spec.ts unrelated to this sprint - limit 20 vs 50 from previous sprint)
